theme_and_archetype.description: A cinematic, moody, Godly-style 3D dark mode experience. High contrast structural elements on a deep obsidian canvas with stark white text and electric amber glowing accents representing 'AI optimization'.

typography.notes: Outfit for tech-focused, geometric headings (tracking-tighter). Manrope for highly legible body copy. NO INTER. Large expressive typography for heroes (text-5xl to 6xl max, tracking-tighter). Overlines in uppercase + tracking-[0.2em].

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. p-12, p-16, p-24 for sections. High negative space.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: MODE A: TETRIS GRID for the portfolio/gallery. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with overlapping spans (col-span-8, col-span-4).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned dominant content. Asymmetrical placements to create visual tension.

ui_surfaces.glassmorphism: Crystal Glass for sticky headers: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, border-b border-white/10.
ui_surfaces.cards: Grid Borders or Tracing Beam style. 1px border-white/10, bg-card, hover:-translate-y-1, hover:border-white/30 transition-all.
ui_surfaces.buttons: Primary: Solid primary bg with black text. Secondary: Outline with border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use framer-motion <AnimatePresence>. Implement a cinematic 'camera shutter' or slide transition between pages (Home, Services, Gallery, About, Contact).
motion_and_interactions.3d_hero: Create a pseudo-3D interconnected network using framer-motion. Animate Lucide icons (Camera, Youtube, Instagram, Wand for AI) orbiting around a central 'AI Node'. Connect them using glowing SVG lines or spring animations. Use the 'ai_camera_core' background behind it.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale down images slightly on hover in the gallery. High-contrast state changes.

components_needed: Framer Motion for page transitions and 3D orbiting node animation
Lucide React for UI and orbiting icons
React Fast Marquee for 'Smart Content Studio AI' ticker tape across the screen
Floating Action Button (FAB) for 'CS Asta Creative' AI Chatbot fixed bottom-right

image_urls.description: Cinematic AI core node. Place this in the Hero section as a dark backdrop, opacity around 40-50% (bg-black/50 overlay) with the orbiting 3D icon network floating in front.
Social Media & AI network glowing in space. Great for the Services or Social Media Optimization section.
High-end robotic camera arm studio setup. Use in the gallery as a col-span-8 or prominent bento item.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React and Tailwind classes to build out the multi-page structure with react-router-dom.
Implement the 'Godly.website' dark mode aesthetic: absolute minimal chrome, very dark background, subtle 1px white/10 borders, electric amber highlights.

Build a robust 3D-like hero using Framer Motion: A central pulsing AI node (Wand/Brain icon) with surrounding nodes (Camera, Mic, Smartphone, Instagram/Youtube icons) orbiting in a continuous circle (animate: { rotate: 360 }) inside a perspective container.
In the global CSS, import Outfit and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Create a Floating Action Button for 'CS Asta Creative' that opens a mock chatbot widget.
Ensure all copy is bilingual (Indonesian priority) regarding digital marketing, content creation, and AI integration.
